series_metadata.series_description: Agreements - ODOT/Agency which contain the State/Metropolitan Planning Organizations handling agency agreement (for each of the 17 Metropolitan Planning Organizations), which specifies the cooperative efforts of the respective Metropolitan Planning Organizations and ODOT to conduct the "3-C planning process"(Based on Federal regulations 23 Code of Federal Regualtions Part 450.322 meaning "Continuing, Cooperative and Comprehensive Planning") for two state fiscal years.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronically for 10 years., Electronic: Delete
